name: Inferno
short_description: After discovering & rescuing an unconscious elite warrior from a dangerous jungle, a soldier, a scientist and a nurse decide to team up and escape from the ravaged army base where they'd been struggling for days. Can they find help in the jungle? Who will survive and make it?
detailed_description:
SUMMARY


After discovering and rescuing an unconscious elite warrior from a dangerous jungle, a soldier, a scientist and a nurse decide to team up and escape from the ravaged army base where they'd been struggling for days.
Abandoned by their hierarchy and most likely left for dead, their only salvation lies in the genius of their awkward companion Josef, and his ability to figure out a route through the jungle and back into civilization.
But with drastic conditions and raging monsters all over the place, one thing's for sure: the mission is not going to be easy. And as the past of their chance ally Pristine slowly comes to light, it appears clear that staying alive is going to require more than just might. Can they find help in the jungle surrounding them? Who will survive and make it? Play the game and find out!

FEATURES


  • Up to 8 hours of playtime
  • 2 modes of difficulty
  • Mouse control
  • Auto-saving
  • Unique, innovative story with immersive dialogues - Indinera's signature!
  • Great artworks, production values and atmospheric soundscape
  • Make sure to download the guide sample for basic knowledge of the game

RECOMMENDATIONS


If you liked this game, you may also like:
